title: anchor pre-check before builder.build() — worth defending against removal
description: Step 6 computes the Sapling anchor from each witness and checks all anchors are equal before calling builder.build(). A contributor might suggest removing this 'since the builder checks anyway'. Do not do that: the builder's error is an opaque BuilderError string; our pre-check returns TxBuildError::AnchorMismatch with an actionable message telling the user to wait for the scanner to catch up. The pre-check is the user-facing error; the builder check is the invariant guard.
close_reason: decision records documented in beads; no code change required
